description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It uses AI to streamline video production, add captions, enhance quality, and save hours of manual editing work.

policies.detail: No refunds are provided after 7 days from the date of purchase. Within the first 7 days, users may request a full refund.
24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support with a 1-2 business day response time.
Users can cancel their subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing period.
AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required to start the trial.

faqs.question: What video formats does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM formats for both input and output.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect from the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is AutoStream suitable for YouTube creators?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! AutoStream is specifically designed for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and other content creator platforms. The Pro plan's AI captions and 4K export are especially popular among YouTubers.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream work on mobile?
faqs.answer: AutoStream has a web app that works on mobile browsers, and native iOS and Android apps are currently in beta.
